narrative:
Precinct New Phila 4-B (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 788 registered voters, with 55.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.7%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.8 percentage points.
